lines.speaker: family
lines.text: Jasper! You made it! We were so worried...

lines.speaker: jasper
lines.text: Mom, Dad... I can't believe I'm finally home.

lines.speaker: family
lines.text: We watched you — the forest, the city, all those dangers.

lines.speaker: jasper
lines.text: I had to get back to you. Nothing was going to stop me.

lines.speaker: family
lines.text: Come here. You're safe now. You're home.

finish_prompt: Jasper has found his way home.
